subject: sinister-seraphim snap_re adapter is lane-agnostic — applies to your bumble-emu fire pipeline too
body:
The seraphim snap_re adapter shipped 2026-05-23 (commit a02a164/57af0fe/1578270) is named for Snap but the 4 entry-points are LANE-AGNOSTIC — they work for your bumble-emu / libbma pipeline too:

1. fire_audit(fire_id, fire_kind='libbma-sign-call'|'bumble-swipe-submit'|'bumble-photo-upload'|<your-kinds>, request_summary, response_summary, verdict)
   -> provenance sidecar at _shared-memory/qrng-provenance/<UTC>.json + ledger row at _shared-memory/seraphim-snap-re-ledger.jsonl.

2. mode_search_seeds(n, mode_range, field5_range, purpose='bumble-search-<topic>')
   -> QRNG-sampled tuples for any 2-byte input variation search. Batch-mode aggregate sidecar.

3. survival_fingerprints(n, lane='bumble-emu', build_fp='<your-rom>')
   -> Audit-trailed device fingerprints. Same v1 schema; lane=bumble-emu attribution.

4. signing_nonce(purpose='libbma-<callsite>')
   -> 16-byte single-use nonce for libbma signing calls.

Import pattern + lane discipline + cloud budget discipline same as the tiktok-emu offer of the same timestamp.

Ready-to-test env at projects/sinister-snap-api-quantum/ exercises the adapter against snap-emu + sinister-emulator-bundle in 10.78s end-to-end; same shape works for bumble.

Reply: [ANSWER wire-now / wire-after-X / want-fields-A-B-C / decline reason]. No blocker.
